generated_oml:
instance BCSSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensors within Building Control System (BCS) components as part of enriched BIM models"
    DTDFVocab:producedData BCSDataTransmitted
]

instance BCSDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom BCSSensor
]

instance BCSData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time data from Building Control System sensors for synchronization with digital twin"
    DTDFVocab:fromData BCSDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ModularArchitectureEnabler
]

instance BIMEnrichedModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Computational model based on Building Information Modeling (BIM) geometric representations enriched with Building Control System (BCS) components (sensors, actuators, controllers) defined by Building Control Engineers"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ModularArchitectureEnabler
]

instance DeployableDTArtifacts : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Deployable Digital Twin artifacts generated via Model-Driven Engineering (MDE) principles from enriched BIM models with minimal manual intervention"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ModularArchitectureEnabler
]

instance ModularArchitectureEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Modular architecture providing standardized extension points for integrating custom services and analytics, enabling DT evolution in response to changing operational requirements"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService, PredictiveAnalyticsService, SimulationService, AnalysisService, OptimizationService
]

instance RealTimeMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time monitoring service providing continuous insights into infrastructure assets"
    DTDFVocab:provides InteractiveVisualizationInsight
]

instance PredictiveAnalyticsService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Predictive analytics service for forecasting infrastructure performance and maintenance needs"
    DTDFVocab:provides PredictiveInsight
]

instance SimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Simulation service for modeling infrastructure behavior under various scenarios"
    DTDFVocab:provides SimulationInsight
]

instance AnalysisService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Analysis service for evaluating infrastructure performance and optimizing operations"
    DTDFVocab:provides AnalysisInsight
]

instance OptimizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Optimization service for improving resource allocation and operational efficiency"
    DTDFVocab:provides OptimizationInsight
]

instance InteractiveVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Immersive interface for monitoring and control of physical infrastructure via interactive visualization"
]

instance PredictiveInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predictive insights for infrastructure performance and maintenance needs"
]

instance SimulationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Simulation insights for infrastructure behavior under various scenarios"
]

instance AnalysisInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Analysis insights for evaluating infrastructure performance and optimizing operations"
]

instance OptimizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Optimization insights for improving resource allocation and operational efficiency"
]

instance BuildingComponent : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Physical building infrastructure asset in AECO domain"
]

instance BuildingEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Infrastructure assets within the Architecture, Engineering, Construction, and Operations (AECO) domain, characterized by cyber-physical integration for simulation, analysis, and optimization across the building lifecycle"
    base:contains BuildingComponent, BCSSensor
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Control commands are transmitted from the digital twin to physical building systems through bidirectional communication, enabling Facility Managers to interact with deployed DT for real-time monitoring and control."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real-time data exchange enables continuous synchronization between physical and digital components with no specified frequency or latency metrics beyond real-time operation."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Centralized orchestration via the DT Framework coordinating roles and components for bidirectional data exchange, enriched BIM model integration, and runtime configuration management to enable holistic building lifecycle management."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The framework supports the complete DT lifecycle from initial device modeling in BIM (Building Control Engineers define sensors, actuators, and controllers), through MDE-based extraction of structured representations and automatic generation of deployable artifacts, to runtime operations with real-time data exchange and interactive visualization for Facility Managers, and evolution via modular integration of custom services by DT Engineers."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "The Overall Digital Twin Entanglement (ODTE) metric is used to evaluate the entanglement of the resulting Digital Twin."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "The framework integrates Eclipse Hono and Ditto for real-time data exchange, utilizing standardized protocols to facilitate bidirectional communication between physical assets and digital twins."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "Interoperability across heterogeneous systems is achieved through standardized BIM-based modeling and modular framework extension points, enabling integration with enterprise systems and external services though specific protocols are not detailed."
]
